location: On a corpse past a Fire Knight on an upper floor of the Specimen Storehouse (Shadow Keep) — from the "Storehouse, First Floor" grace, climb multiple staircases north, then jump a walkway/buttress to the left of the Fire Knight to reach the corpse.
region: Shadow Keep (Specimen Storehouse, Shadow of the Erdtree DLC)

source.name: Corpse past the Fire Knight above Storehouse, First Floor grace

tactics: From Storehouse, First Floor grace, head north past the bookshelves (Sir Ansbach's reading nook is in this first room — useful landmark, not the objective) and climb the stairs
Keep climbing two to three more flights, fighting or sneaking past shadow soldiers/casters, until you reach a tall Fire Knight patrolling a wooden walkway
Instead of engaging the knight head-on, look left of it for a buttress/walkway leading to a stone floor — jump the railing here to land near the corpse holding the shield

This is a different Fire Knight encounter than the one guarding the Carian Thrusting Shield in the Back Section of the same building — easy to mix up since both are "past a Fire Knight" in the Specimen Storehouse
lore: A combined blade-and-shield built for thrusting and guarding at once. It once saw use in formal duels fought to honor the Erdtree — a tradition that, oddly, carried over into the Land of Shadow.

builds.name: Dexterity duelist
builds.why: Dexterity scaling (75 internal) outweighs Strength (52), and high base physical damage plus strong elemental guard values suit a pure-DEX poke-and-block playstyle

builds.name: Quality bleed build
builds.why: Solid secondary Strength scaling lets a standard quality build slot this in, pairing a bleed-inflicting Ash of War with its high guard boost to tank hits mid-combo
